case_title: AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SALVADOR CARDENAS JR et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-18-2013 CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
